indications.text:
ISTURISA is indicated for the treatment of endogenous hypercortisolemia in adults with Cushing’s syndrome for
whom surgery is not an option or has not been curative.

ISTURISA is a cortisol synthesis inhibitor indicated for the treatment of adult patients with Cushing’s disease for whom
pituitary surgery is not an option or has not been curative.

ISTURISA is indicated for the treatment of endogenous hypercortisolemia in adults with Cushing’s syndrome for
whom surgery is not an option or has not been curative.

ISTURISA is indicated for the treatment of endogenous hypercortisolemia in adults with Cushing’s syndrome for
whom surgery is not an option or has not been curative.
